title: SpyCloud Threat Intelligence
description: This dashboard provides an overview of logs that matched IOCs identified through SpyCloud Threat Intelligence.

definition.content:
[SpyCloud](https://spycloud.com) recaptures exposed identity data from the criminal underground, including breaches, malware infections, and phishing activity, and makes this raw stolen data actionable for security teams.

This dashboard provides an overview of logs that matched IOCs identified through SpyCloud Threat Intelligence.

For more information, see the [SpyCloud Datadog Integration Documentation](https://docs.datadoghq.com/integrations/spycloud/).

**Tips**
- Use the timeframe selector in the top right of the dashboard to change the default timeframe.
- Clone this dashboard to rearrange, modify and add widgets and visualizations.

This group provides visibility into logs enriched with matched IOCs from SpyCloud, highlighting IOC trends, severity, breach context, users, hosts, and machines. Use this group to identify exposed assets, monitor suspicious activity, and prioritize investigations based on threat intelligence.

definition.description: This Pie Chart shows the distribution of matched IOCs by SpyCloud severity. See the [SpyCloud documentation](https://docs.spycloud.com/public-sc/docs/severity-score-source-types-metadata#:~:text=%F0%9F%93%8A-,Severity%20Table,-Severity) for guidance on interpreting severity values.

definition.content: Datadog Cloud SIEM analyzes and correlates logs identified malicious by SpyCloud Threat Intelligence to detect threats to your environment in real time. If you don't see signals please make sure you've enabled [Datadog Cloud SIEM](/security/siem/home).
